sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT normalizedQueryHashKeepNames('SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id = 1') AS query_hash;
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Charlie' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT normalizedQueryHashKeepNames('SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE id IN (1,2)') AS complex_query_hash;
